case_title: ANA COTO VS. LLEWELLYN JACKSON ET AL

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$40.00) SERVED SEP-29-2017, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT HU, YUGENF

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-21-2017 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT TO DEC-27-2017 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. DEFENDANT YUGNEF HU DOES NOT STIPULATE TO A HEARING BY A JUDGE PRO TEM. PLAINTIFF ANA COTO IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT JAMES KERIGAN IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT YUGNEF HU IS PRESENT, ASSISTED BY CONNIE CHEN, CERTIFIED MANDARIN INTERPRETER. DEFENDANT LIEWELLYN JACKSON IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: ELIZABETH ZAREH; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
ORDER DEFENDANT DOES NOT STIPULATE TO A HEARING BEFORE A JUDGE PRO TEM
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO PLAINTIFF COTO, ANA
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE PRO TEM JUDGE FILED BY COTO, ANA JACKSON, LLEWELLYN HU, YUGENF

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF COTO, ANA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT JACKSON, LLEWELLYN HU, YUGENF $4,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $170.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,670.00, THE COURT FINDS EVIDENCE OF BAD FAITH PURSUANT OF CIVIL CODE OF 1950.5 (L) BY THE DEFENDANTS LLEWELLYN JACKSON AND YUGENF HU FOR THEIR FAILURE TO RETURN DEFENDANT'S SECURITY DEPOSIT. ACTION IS DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS TO DEFENDANT JAMES KERRIGAN. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-27-2017 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-27-2017 BY JUDGE PRO TEM JEAN MILEFF. PLAINTIFF ANA COTO IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT JAMES KERIGAN IS PRESENT. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
